demographics.living_situation: lives with a sibling who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is boring straight through the middle of my stomach into my spine, and I can't stop throwing up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been going for about a day now, it won't let up, and I can't keep any water down at all.

symptom_narrative.duration: constant for roughly a day, not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: a deep boring pain in the middle of my upper belly that goes straight through to my back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe, the worst I've had, I can barely move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high in the middle of my stomach, drilling through to my spine
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: it eases a bit if I sit up and lean forward
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: much worse if I lie flat on my back
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: throwing up over and over — more than ten times — it's greenish/bitter, and I can't keep water down; felt a bit hot overnight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck sitting hunched on the edge of the couch, weak and worn out

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol I bought from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: had a big weekend of heavy drinking just before this started
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a sibling who is supportive but can't manage all the vomiting and dehydration at home

objective_data_offered.value: sitting hunched forward on the edge of the couch, leaning forward, weak and lethargic
he looks pale and washed out, lips and mouth look dry
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: sibling's visual impression, not a clinical assessment

objective_data_offered.value: he's been sick more than ten times since yesterday and can't hold water down
he felt hot to touch overnight
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: felt by hand, no thermometer used
